results.title: Ben & Jerry's Foundation says it will suspend operations
results.description: The Ben & Jerry’s Foundation says it will suspend its operations on Dec. 31 unless a legal ruling in its favor restores its funding.

results.title: BBC FIFA World Cup viewers ask 'is that him?' as pop legend spotted at semi-final
results.description: England's football team were playing Argentina on Wednesday night in the World Cup semi-finals.

results.title: Joburg braces for another water maintenance shutdown — what you need to know
results.description: Johannesburg residents brace for another maintenance shutdown this Friday, 17 July 2026, as crucial water supply systems face reduced pressure and possible shortages across numerous communities.

results.title: Isolated storms on the Gulf Coast Wednesday
results.description: More rain is possible Wednesday, but not everyone is expected to see it. Your Gulf Coast Weather Most Accurate Forecast calls for isolated showers and thunderstorms to develop, and some storms could bring gusty winds, heavy rainfall, and frequent lightning.

results.title: Child, 11, dies after he's hit by bus 'trying to get to mum'
results.description: A coroner concluded Seth Fulton crossed the road when it was 'not safe to go'

results.title: Arkansas first in religious liberty but consider the source
results.description: Arkansas force feeds the 10 Commandments to students and gets a prize for the effort.

results.title: Minority stages walkout in Parliament over Deputy Speaker's ruling
results.description: The Minority Caucus in Parliament staged a walkout accusing First Deputy Speaker Bernard Ahiafor of frustrating parliamentary oversight by preventing members from asking supplementary questions to a minister.

results.title: United: Q2 Earnings Snapshot
results.description: CHICAGO (AP) — CHICAGO (AP) — United Airlines Holdings Inc. (UAL) on Wednesday reported second-quarter earnings of $805 million.
